zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Fletcher於1501年出生在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾哈利法可。她於1521年10月26日與John Hughes在英國英格蘭越可爾哈利法可聖 約翰 馮 巴普迪斯也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Fletcher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for an arrowsmith, from Middle English fleccher, Old French flechier, flecher ‘fletcher’, for someone who made or sold arrows for bows. This surname has sometimes been confused with Flesher .

variants.name: Flesher
meanings: English: occupational name for a butcher, from Middle English fles(c)her, flesho(u)r ‘butcher’, an agent derivative of flesh ‘meat’, or from Middle English fleshheuer, fleshewer ‘butcher’, a compound of flesh ‘meat’ + heuer ‘cutter’. This surname has sometimes been confused with Fletcher .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Fletcher was born in 1501, in Halifax, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. She married John Hughes on 26 October 1521, in St John the Baptist's Church, Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in England, United Kingdom.

ja.Halifax, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックス
ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Fletcherは1501年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアハリファックスで生まれた。1521年10月26日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックススト ジョン ス バプティスト'ス チャーチでJohn Hughesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.Saint John the Baptist Church, Halifax,: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Fletcher(은)는 1501년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 할이파스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1521년 10월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치에서 John Hughes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Fletcher родилась в 1501 г. в местности хэлифакс, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hughes 26 октября 1521 г. в местности ст джон т баптист'с чурч, хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности Англия, Великобритания.
